title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!
